name: testing-and-ha
description: Selenium Grid, k6, MailHog, Chaos Mesh, HA pass across all charts, GitLab CI vendor builds.
sprintGoal: Harden all platform Helm charts with HA primitives (PDB, anti-affinity, replica minima) so every deployment survives a node failure.

stories.title: HA pass: PodDisruptionBudgets, anti-affinity, and replica hardening for all charts
stories.description: Audit every Helm chart in charts/ and ensure HA is properly configured. This story is a systematic pass over all charts to enforce the HA standards documented in CLAUDE.md. For each chart: (1) ensure default replicaCount >= 2 in values.yaml (3 for critical: argocd, keycloak, openbao, gitlab, harbor); (2) add PodDisruptionBudget template with minAvailable: 1; (3) add podAntiAffinity — preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution for standard services, requiredDuring for critical services to guarantee cross-node spread; (4) verify readinessProbe and livenessProbe are defined for every container; (5) verify resources.requests and resources.limits are set. For StatefulSets (gitlab, keycloak, harbor, openbao, rook-ceph): ensure volumeClaimTemplates use global.storageClass. For DaemonSets (cilium, cloudflared): skip replica count (N/A) but verify resource limits. Create charts/_globals/templates/_ha-helpers.tpl with shared PDB and anti-affinity template helpers to avoid duplication. Update ArgoCD Application manifests to set revisionHistoryLimit: 3 (keep last 3 deployable revisions for rollback). Run helm lint and helm template dry-run on every chart after changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Every chart has replicaCount >= 2 as default (>= 3 for argocd, keycloak, openbao, gitlab, harbor)
Every chart has a PodDisruptionBudget template
Every container spec has readinessProbe, livenessProbe, resources.requests, resources.limits
charts/_globals/templates/_ha-helpers.tpl has shared PDB and anti-affinity helpers
All ArgoCD Application manifests have revisionHistoryLimit: 3
helm lint passes on all charts
helm template | kubectl apply --dry-run=client passes on all charts
stories.testPlan: Run quality gates: helm lint, kubectl dry-run, verify all acceptanceCriteria. For each chart: helm lint charts/<name>/; helm template charts/<name>/ | grep PodDisruptionBudget; helm template charts/<name>/ | grep podAntiAffinity; grep replicaCount charts/<name>/values.yaml; helm template charts/<name>/ | kubectl apply --dry-run=client -f -.

smart.notes: Not yet SMART-scored. Run smart-check ceremony before pulling into a sprint.
